untranslatable_reason: Signal requires specialized pair-trading indicators not in allowed list: (1) Cointegration test (ADF p-value) for confirming stationary relationship between two equities, (2) Price spread calculation between paired securities, (3) Standard deviation of spread, (4) Multi-security correlation analysis. The allowed indicator set contains only single-security technical indicators. Pair trading requires cross-security statistical analysis (cointegration, correlation, spread metrics) which cannot be expressed using provided indicators.
translation_notes: This is a pairs trading strategy requiring bivariate statistical tests (ADF cointegration) and spread-based metrics that are not available in the allowed indicator set. A simplified proxy using SMA crossovers on individual instruments was attempted but does not capture the essence of the mean-reversion pairs strategy. The signal should be implemented in a specialized pairs trading module with cointegration analysis.
